title: SearchRecordsRequest
description: A search request for records in a specific namespace.

top_k.description: The number of similar records to return.

filter.description: The filter to apply. You can use vector metadata to limit your search. See [Understanding metadata](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/index-data/indexing-overview#metadata).

id.description: The unique ID of the vector to be used as a query vector.

fields.description: The fields to return in the search results. If not specified, the response will include all fields.

rerank.description: Parameters for reranking the initial search results.

model.description: The name of the [reranking model](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/search/rerank-results#reranking-models) to use.

rank_fields.description:
The field(s) to consider for reranking. If not provided, the default is `["text"]`.

The number of fields supported is [model-specific](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/search/rerank-results#reranking-models).

top_n.description: The number of top results to return after reranking. Defaults to top_k.

parameters.description: Additional model-specific parameters. Refer to the [model guide](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/search/rerank-results#reranking-models) for available model parameters.

query.example: What is the capital of France?
query.description: The query to rerank documents against. If a specific rerank query is specified,  it overwrites the query input that was provided at the top level.
